fields.description: The schema definition body. Format depends on spec.type: a JSON Schema string for JSON, an Avro JSON schema for AVRO, or a .proto file content for PROTOBUF.

Governs how schema evolution is validated against previously registered schemas. BACKWARD (default): new schema can read data written with the old schema. FORWARD: old schema can read data written with the new schema. FULL: both directions. NONE: no compatibility check. *_TRANSITIVE variants enforce compatibility against ALL prior versions, not just the latest.
Schema Registry endpoint URLs the operator uses to register this schema. Typically the Schema Registry Service URL, e.g. ['http://redpanda.redpanda.svc.cluster.local:8081'].
Enable TLS for the operator's Schema Registry connection.
Secret containing the CA certificate for verifying the Schema Registry TLS certificate.
Kafka broker addresses. Used by the operator for authentication when the Schema Registry requires Kafka-backed auth.
Enable SASL authentication for the operator's Kafka connection.
Secret with 'username' and 'password' for the operator's Kafka authentication.
